title: Legendary Weapons
description: Adds some legendary late game weapons that make you very OP
body:
Ever wanted to craft something legendary in your minecraft world? no? well anyways here's 3 legendary weapons that make the game a bit more fun late game, they work best in servers

1: The Xp Scythe
Easily the most powerful of the bunch PVE wise, it is a scythe that gives the user 10 XP every hit, but the downside is that it will do one damage
Special attack: Raw XP blast
XP comes from dragon breath right? well for a small amount of health (number dependent on your armor value) you can fire raw XP at your enemies, if you have regen and netherite armor with no prot, this... well... can get a "bit" broken

2: The illumn8or
cleverly named after myself, the illumn8or is a sword that manipulates light, unfortunately it doesn't make targets glow because for some reason Mcreator wasn't doing the right type of glowing when I inputted it :eyeroll: so when you attack, you give darkness to your enemy and speed 3 and night vis to yourself all for a short duration
Special attack: Light Blast
How ironic would it be to have a light manipulating sword be able to give you the speed of "light" temporarily?... very it seems ._. ... shoot a spectral arrow in the air and give night vis and speed 20 to yourself temporarily, this has a cooldown unlike the others

3: The Combat Axe
By far the most powerful for PVP, this thing absolutley (ik thats spelt wrong windows just wouldnt tell me how to actually spell it>:I)SHREDS, it's a netherite axe with the speed of a sword
Special attack: nothing this thing is fricking OP

Those are the legendary weapons for now

CRAFTING RECIPES:
Obtain a diamond block to see them, why is that what causes the recipes to unlock you ask? well because each weapon requires more than a diamond block each, they vary depending on which one you go for

FABRIC?
NEVER!

PLEASE PORT TO VERSION 1.X.X
This mod will likely never get a port because it's well. made in Mcreator, which I COMPLETELY RECOMMEND TO YOU... if you don't wanna get into coding, more on this in a sec

I HAVE A WEAPON IDEA:
this mod is never gonna get an update, unless it's to fix a bug, and here's why: as I mentioned just before, this is made in Mcreator which is great unless you wanna make good mods, as I am uploading this mod I've actually been learning java so hopefully soon I can completely recreate this mod to just improve on it

CAN I USE THIS IN MY MODPACK?
sure, but gimme credit

CAN I USE THIS IN A SERVER?
Now while most weapons are intended for PVP, I don't recommend you use THIS version on an SMP type server, I have a special build of it for a modded SMP I'm creating with my friends, when I finally get around to signing up to discord, you can DM me and ask for the special build as long as I am invited to the server (unless it's a personal friends server only then sure I won't mind, but will need some kind of proof you're not just lying), but like c'mon this mod isn't amazing I'm sure you won't go to the trouble of doing that just for this silly mod but what evs

ight thats it, I am going to go finish publicizing this mod... cheers!
